1.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
1.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

1.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
1.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

1.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
1.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
1.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

1.gl: a stated assemblage (specifically, a concourse, or generally, a family or crowd)
1.kj: assembly, company, congregation, multitude, people, swarm. Compare H5713 (עֵדָה).
1.dv: feminine of H5707 (עֵד) in the original sense of fixture;

1.kj: convenient, equity, Jasher, just, meet(-est), [phrase] pleased well right(-eous), straight, (most) upright(-ly, -ness).

1.gl: a session, i.e. company of persons (in close deliberation); by implication, intimacy, consultation, a secret

2.gl: an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property
2.kj: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) wo

2.gl: properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship
2.kj: ask, [idiom] at all, care for, [idiom] diligently, inquire, make inquisition, (necro-) mancer, question, require, search, seek (for, out), [idiom] surely.

2.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
2.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

2.gl: pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind)
2.kj: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)
3.kj: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repai

3.gl: properly, a (peremptory) terminus, i.e. (by implication) duration, in the sense of advance or perpetuity (substantially as a noun, either with or without a preposition)
3.kj: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, [phrase] world without end.

3.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)
grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance)
3.kj: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.
beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.
act, deed, do, getting, maker, work.

4.gl: a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever); by implication, commemoration
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)

6.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

6.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);
